transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I wanted to check if you accept Star Health insurance. I have a cashless card.
AGENT: Hello! Yes, Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic is empanelled with Star Health Insurance. We do accept cashless claims under most of their plans.
CALLER: Oh great. And what's the process? Do I need to bring any documents?
AGENT: For a cashless OPD visit, you'll need your Star Health e-card or physical card and a valid photo ID. For IPD admissions, please also carry a referral letter if applicable. Our insurance desk will verify the pre-authorisation directly with Star Health.
CALLER: Okay. And if my plan doesn't cover everything, what happens?
AGENT: In that case, you'd pay the balance amount that's not covered by your policy. Our billing team will give you a clear breakup before you proceed.
CALLER: That sounds fair. Thank you for the info.
AGENT: You're welcome! Feel free to call again if you have more questions.
